Record Class LegendaInfo

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.traducao.projeto.analisadorMidia.domain.LegendaInfo
public record LegendaInfo(Integer index, Integer indexRelativo, String idioma, String formato, String codecId, String titulo, String tipoCompleto, String tipoCurto, String categoria, boolean extraivel, boolean traduzivel, boolean exigeOcr, boolean isDefault, boolean isForced, boolean acessibilidade, Double duracaoSegundos, Double diferencaFimSegundos) extends Record
Faixa de legenda detectada, com classificação de traduzibilidade e flags do contêiner. Os indicadores temporais (duracaoSegundos, diferencaFimSegundos) são apenas INFORMAÇÃO TÉCNICA — o módulo não emite veredito automático de sincronismo.

  • Constructor Details

    • LegendaInfo

      public LegendaInfo(Integer index, Integer indexRelativo, String idioma, String formato, String codecId, String titulo, String tipoCompleto, String tipoCurto, String categoria, boolean extraivel, boolean traduzivel, boolean exigeOcr, boolean isDefault, boolean isForced, boolean acessibilidade, Double duracaoSegundos, Double diferencaFimSegundos)
      Creates an instance of a LegendaInfo record class.
      Parameters:
      index - the value for the index record component
      indexRelativo - the value for the indexRelativo record component
      idioma - the value for the idioma record component
      formato - the value for the formato record component
      codecId - the value for the codecId record component
      titulo - the value for the titulo record component
      tipoCompleto - the value for the tipoCompleto record component
      tipoCurto - the value for the tipoCurto record component
      categoria - the value for the categoria record component
      extraivel - the value for the extraivel record component
      traduzivel - the value for the traduzivel record component
      exigeOcr - the value for the exigeOcr record component
      isDefault - the value for the isDefault record component
      isForced - the value for the isForced record component
      acessibilidade - the value for the acessibilidade record component
      duracaoSegundos - the value for the duracaoSegundos record component
      diferencaFimSegundos - the value for the diferencaFimSegundos record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
